title: dactylorchis salina
intro: Dactylorchis salina, also known as Spiranthes romanzoffiana or Pacific Lady's Tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Dactylorchis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorchis salina include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Dactylorchis salina can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
